title: The test under PD 6B, [3.1(9)(b)] was held to be satisfied in circumstances where a ‘hack’ of devices located within the jurisdiction emanated from abroad

evidence.clean_text: 130. In Ashton Investments Ltd v OJSC Russian Aluminium [2007] 1 All ER (Comm) 857, [62]-[63], the test under PD 6B, [3.1(9)(b)] was held to be satisfied in circumstances where a ‘hack’ of devices located within the jurisdiction emanated from abroad.
